stories.title: Remove unused IconButton component
stories.description: The IconButton component file and its exported variants (FullscreenButton, CloseButton, DashboardCloseButton) are not imported or used anywhere in the codebase, based on comprehensive search across all TypeScript and TSX files.
acceptance_criteria: IconButton.tsx file is deleted from src/components/
No references to IconButton remain in the codebase
Build and lint commands pass without errors
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Run 'bun run build' to ensure the application compiles successfully without the IconButton component, 2) Run 'bun run lint' to verify no linting errors related to missing imports or unused code, 3) Run 'bun run typecheck' to confirm TypeScript compilation succeeds without the removed component.

stories.title: Remove unused UnoCSS stylesheet
stories.description: The project has migrated from UnoCSS to Tailwind CSS, but the old uno.css file remains in public/styles/ and is not referenced anywhere in the HTML or build process.
acceptance_criteria: No references to uno.css remain in the codebase
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Start the development server with 'bun dev', 2) Navigate to the login page and verify all styling (glass-card, glass-button, glass-input) renders correctly with Tailwind CSS, 3) Check browser network tab to confirm only tailwind.css is loaded, not uno.css.

stories.title: Remove migration-related E2E tests
stories.description: Several E2E test files were created for verifying component replacements and styling migration (button-component-replacement.spec.ts, input-component-replacement.spec.ts, input-shadcn-replacement.spec.ts, layout-navigation-shadcn.spec.ts, test-shadcn-setup.spec.ts, verify-styling-migration.spec.ts) and are no longer needed for ongoing development.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 migration test files are deleted from e2e/ directory
E2E test suite still runs successfully
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Run 'bun run test:e2e' to execute the remaining E2E tests, 2) Verify that auth.spec.ts and other core tests pass, 3) Confirm the test run completes without attempting to run the deleted migration tests.

stories.title: Remove test shadcn route from server
stories.description: The /test-shadcn route in server.tsx was added for testing shadcn/ui setup and button variants but is not part of the production application flow.
acceptance_criteria: Application still starts and serves login/home pages correctly
No broken links or references to the removed route
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Start the server with 'bun run server', 2) Verify the login page loads at root path, 3) Attempt to navigate to /test-shadcn and confirm it returns a 404 not found page, 4) Complete a full authentication flow to ensure core functionality remains intact.

stories.title: Update README to reflect Tailwind CSS usage
stories.description: The README.md incorrectly states 'UnoCSS' as the styling framework, but the project actually uses Tailwind CSS as evidenced by package.json dependencies and build scripts.
acceptance_criteria: README.md 'Styling' section updated from 'UnoCSS' to 'Tailwind CSS'
No other inaccurate information in README
README accurately reflects current tech stack
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Read the updated README.md file to verify the styling section now mentions 'Tailwind CSS', 2) Confirm package.json contains tailwindcss dependency and build scripts reference tailwindcss, 3) Verify the build process still works with 'bun run build:css'.

stories.title: Remove unused email utility functions
stories.description: In src/utils/email.ts, the functions getEmailDomain and getEmailUsername are defined but not used anywhere in the codebase, while normalizeEmail is used in auth flows.
acceptance_criteria: getEmailDomain and getEmailUsername functions removed from src/utils/email.ts
No references to removed functions remain
stories.test_spec: Test guidance: 1) Run 'bun run typecheck' to ensure no TypeScript errors from removed functions, 2) Run unit tests with 'bun run test:unit' to verify auth-related email normalization still works, 3) Perform an authentication flow to confirm email processing functions correctly.
